# Load the provided JSON files and inspect structure, then search for candidate matches.
import json
from pathlib import Path
qfile = Path("/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json")
hfile = Path("/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json")
print("Files exist:", qfile.exists(), hfile.exists())
# Load first 10 items of quranic_verses.json to inspect structure
qdata = json.load(open(qfile, "r", encoding="utf-8"))
print("Number of Quran verses:", len(qdata))
print("Sample entry keys:", list(qdata[0].keys()) if len(qdata)>0 else "empty")
print("Sample ayah_text (first 3):")
for i in range(min(3,len(qdata))):
    print(i, qdata[i].get("ayah_text")[:200])
# Load hadith file structure
hdata = json.load(open(hfile, "r", encoding="utf-8"))
print("Number of hadith entries:", len(hdata))
print("Sample hadith keys:", list(hdata[0].keys()) if len(hdata)>0 else "empty")
print("Sample hadith text (first 3):")
for i in range(min(3, len(hdata))):
    # print both possible fields
    print(i, hdata[i].get("hadithTxt")[:200] if hdata[i].get("hadithTxt") else hdata[i].get("Matn")[:200])

# Let's search for best matches in quranic verses for the given span and snippet.
import json, re, difflib, math
from collections import Counter

qdata = json.load(open("/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json", "r", encoding="utf-8"))
hdata = json.load(open("/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json", "r", encoding="utf-8"))

full_span = "وَلَا تَرْتَعوا بِقُلُوبِكُمُ الْعَنَاتِ أَن تَكُونُوا شَاهِدِينَ عَلَى أَيّامِ اللَّهِ وَتَرْجُمُونَ قَومًا وَتُصْلِحُونَ"
snippet = "وَلَا تَرْ...ُصْلِحُونَ"

# Normalization function
arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""
                             ّ    | # Shadda
                             َ    | # Fatha
                             ً    | # Tanwin Fath
                             ُ    | # Damma
                             ٌ    | # Tanwin Damm
                             ِ    | # Kasra
                             ٍ    | # Tanwin Kasr
                             ْ    | # Sukun
                             ـ     # Tatweel/Kashida
                         """, re.VERBOSE)

def normalize_ar(text):
    # remove tashkeel
    t = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', text)
    # remove punctuation and bracket characters and commas, quotes, etc
    t = re.sub(r'[ـ،\.\!\?؛:\-\—"\'\(\)\[\]\{\}«»…،/‎]', ' ', t)
    # unify hamzas: map أ إ آ ؤ ئ to ا or و/ي? 
    t = t.replace('إ', 'ا').replace('أ', 'ا').replace('آ', 'ا')
    t = t.replace('ؤ', 'و').replace('ئ', 'ي')
    # normalize alef-maqsura to ya
    t = t.replace('ى', 'ي')
    # remove tashkeel leftover (if any)
    t = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', t)
    # collapse multiple spaces & lower
    t = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', t).strip()
    # lowercase - Arabic doesn't have case, but keep
    return t

norm_full = normalize_ar(full_span)
norm_snippet = normalize_ar(snippet)
print("Normalized full span:", norm_full)
print("Normalized snippet:", norm_snippet[:100])

# Define function for similarity measures
def lcs_ratio(a, b):
    # Use difflib SequenceMatcher to estimate similarity of whole strings
    s = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, a, b)
    return s.ratio()

def token_overlap(a, b):
    sa = set(a.split())
    sb = set(b.split())
    if not sa and not sb: return 0.0
    overlap = sa & sb
    return len(overlap) / ((len(sa)+len(sb))/2)

# Search qdata for top matches using lcs_ratio between normalized texts
best = []
for entry in qdata:
    text = entry.get("ayah_text","")
    norm_text = normalize_ar(text)
    r = lcs_ratio(norm_full, norm_text)
    to = token_overlap(norm_full, norm_text)
    best.append((r, to, entry['surah_name'], entry['surah_id'], entry['ayah_id'], text))

best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
for i in range(20):
    r,to,sname,sid,aid,text = best_sorted[i]
    print(i+1, f"ratio={r:.4f} token_overlap={to:.4f}", f"{sname} {sid}:{aid}", text)

# Search hadith DB for best matches
best_h = []
for entry in hdata:
    # get matn string: prefer hadithTxt then Matn
    text = entry.get("hadithTxt") or entry.get("Matn") or ""
    norm_text = normalize_ar(text)
    r = lcs_ratio(norm_full, norm_text)
    to = token_overlap(norm_full, norm_text)
    best_h.append((r, to, entry.get("hadithID"), entry.get("BookID"), text[:200]))

best_h_sorted = sorted(best_h, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
for i in range(20):
    r,to,hid,bid,text = best_h_sorted[i]
    print(i+1, f"ratio={r:.4f} token_overlap={to:.4f}", f"hadithID={hid} BookID={bid}", text)
